allow: PowerShell(gh pr list --head develop --state all --json number,url,state,title,baseRefName)

PowerShell(Get-Command gh -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($null -eq \(Get-Command gh -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\)\) { @\("$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Programs\\GitHub CLI\\gh.exe", "$env:ProgramFiles\\GitHub CLI\\gh.exe", "${env:ProgramFiles\(x86\)}\\GitHub CLI\\gh.exe"\) | ForEach-Object { if \(Test-Path $_\) { Write-Output "FOUND: $_" } } })
